column2: POKER TOURNAMENT DIRECTORS ASSN.2024 Rules Version 1.0. Oct 9, 2024Longform Version Includes:Recommended Procedures and Illustration Addendum撲克賽事總監協會2024年規則 版本1.0 於2024年10月9日發行內容包含賽事推薦操作流程及附加案例中文修訂：朱翊文

column1: The Poker TDA is a voluntary poker industry association founded in 2001. The TDA mission is to increase global uniformity of poker tournament rules. TDA Rules supplement the conventional rules of this house. In case of conflict with a gaming agency, the agency rules apply.
